appLanguage.description: Choose the language used for application controls and messages.
appLanguage.label: App Language

autoCheckForUpdates.description: Automatically check for all available updates
autoCheckForUpdates.label: Auto-check for updates on startup

confirmOnClose.description: Show confirmation when closing with unsaved changes
confirmOnClose.label: Confirm on Close

liveSafetyMode.description: Limit secondary controllers to line navigation during service
liveSafetyMode.label: Live Safety Mode

skipSectionTitlesOnKeyboard.description: Move between lyric lines while keeping section headers available in the editor
skipSectionTitlesOnKeyboard.label: Skip Section Titles with Arrow Keys

toastSounds.description: Play notification sounds when toast messages appear
toastSounds.label: Toast Sounds

appTheme.description: Choose the application color theme. "System Default" follows your operating system's theme setting.
appTheme.label: App Theme
appTheme.systemNote: When using System Default, the dark mode toggle in the control panel and the View menu will be disabled. The app will automatically switch between light and dark mode based on your system preferences.

showCanvasQuickActions.description: Show Add Translation and Add Timestamp buttons near the cursor in the song editor
showCanvasQuickActions.label: Show Canvas Quick Actions

showTooltips.description: Display helpful tooltips when hovering over controls
showTooltips.label: Show Tooltips

showTutorialPopovers.description: Show short guidance popovers for helpful app markers and features
showTutorialPopovers.label: Show Tutorial Popovers

actionLog.description: Review recent line, setlist, output, stage, safety, and remote controller actions.
actionLog.modalDescription: Review recent live-control actions and export a text copy
actionLog.title: Operator Action Log

dock.description: Control LyricDisplay from an OBS dock while LyricDisplay runs quietly in the background.
dock.devHelp: In development, start Dock Mode with npm run electron-dev:headless from the app folder.
dock.modalDescription: Copy the OBS dock URL and review Dock Mode startup options

startAtSignIn.description: Make LyricDisplay Dock ready automatically after you sign in.
startAtSignIn.label: Start at Sign In
startAtSignIn.notAvailable: Startup registration is not available on this system.

dock.title: LyricDisplay Dock

toast.disabledMessage: LyricDisplay Dock will no longer start automatically when you sign in.
toast.enabledMessage: LyricDisplay Dock will be ready after you sign in, without opening the desktop window.
toast.enabledTitle: Dock Mode Will Start at Sign-In
toast.failedMessage: Could not update Start at Sign-In for LyricDisplay Dock.

dockMode.confirmBody: Save any unsaved work before continuing. After the switch, use LyricDisplay Dock in OBS to control lyrics and output settings.
dockMode.confirmDescription: LyricDisplay will keep running for the OBS dock without the desktop window.
dockMode.errorFallback: LyricDisplay could not switch to Dock Mode.

hardwareAcceleration.description: Force rendering on the CPU instead of the GPU (requires restart)
hardwareAcceleration.label: Disable Hardware Acceleration

intro.description: These settings are for advanced users. Changing them may affect application stability.
intro.title: Advanced Settings

restart.message: Changes to hardware acceleration require restarting the app.
restart.title: Restart Required

security.title: Security Token Key
security.usage: Used by this app to sign local authentication tokens. Stale keys rotate automatically on startup.

defaultInterval.description: Default time between automatic line transitions
defaultInterval.label: Default Interval (seconds)

loopAtEnd.description: Return to first line after reaching the end
loopAtEnd.label: Loop at End

skipBlankLines.description: Automatically skip empty lines during playback
skipBlankLines.label: Skip Blank Lines

startFromFirstLine.description: Begin autoplay from the first line
startFromFirstLine.label: Start from First Line

quickAssign.description: Choose an action, then press a button/pedal/knob on your MIDI device. (Listens for an unmapped control.)
quickAssign.label: Quick assign

sendFeedback.description: Send state updates to OSC clients
sendFeedback.label: Send Feedback

osc.serverFailed: OSC server failed to start. Check if port is in use.
osc.title: OSC Control

defaultLyricsFolder.description: This folder will open by default when loading lyrics files (Ctrl+O). Disabled when "Remember Last Opened Path" is enabled.
defaultLyricsFolder.label: Default Lyrics Folder

maxFileSize.description: Maximum size for lyrics files (larger files may slow down parsing)
maxFileSize.label: Max File Size (MB)

maxRecentFiles.description: Maximum number of files to show in the recent files list
maxRecentFiles.label: Max Recent Files

maxSetlistFiles.description: Maximum number of songs allowed in a setlist ({{min}}-{{max}})
maxSetlistFiles.label: Max Setlist Files
maxSetlistFiles.warning: Large setlists may impact performance when loading or switching between songs

rememberLastOpenedPath.description: Use the last opened folder instead of default
rememberLastOpenedPath.label: Remember Last Opened Path

autoCleanupOnPaste.description: Automatically format and clean up lyrics when pasting into the song canvas
autoCleanupOnPaste.label: Auto Cleanup on Paste

capitalizeFirstLetter.description: Automatically capitalize the first letter of each lyric line during cleanup
capitalizeFirstLetter.label: Capitalize First Letter

capitalizeReligiousTerms.description: Auto-capitalize words like Jesus, God, Holy Spirit, Hallelujah, etc.
capitalizeReligiousTerms.label: Capitalize Religious Terms

normalizeTypographicChars.description: Convert smart quotes, em dashes, and other typographic characters to plain equivalents
normalizeTypographicChars.label: Normalize Typographic Characters

enableLineSplitting.description: Automatically split long lines for better display
enableLineSplitting.label: Enable Line Splitting

maxLength.description: Maximum characters before forcing a line break
maxLength.label: Maximum Line Length

minLength.description: Minimum characters before allowing a line break
minLength.label: Minimum Line Length

overflowTolerance.description: Extra characters allowed when finding a good break point
overflowTolerance.label: Overflow Tolerance

autoLaunch.description: Launch NDI companion when LyricDisplay opens
autoLaunch.label: Start with LyricDisplay

ndi.description: The NDI companion broadcasts your lyric outputs as NDI video sources, allowing integration with OBS, vMix, and other NDI-compatible software.

download.description: Download the NDI companion to enable video broadcasting from your lyric outputs.
download.label: Download NDI Companion

telemetry.title: Runtime Telemetry
telemetry.waiting: Waiting for telemetry data from companion...

ndi.trademark: NDI is a registered trademark of Vizrt NDI AB. This application is not affiliated with or endorsed by Vizrt NDI AB. Learn more at

autoLineGrouping.description: Automatically group consecutive short lines together
autoLineGrouping.label: Auto Line Grouping

crossBlankLineGrouping.description: Allow grouping lines separated by blank lines
crossBlankLineGrouping.label: Cross Blank Line Grouping

maxLineLength.description: Lines shorter than this will be considered for auto-grouping
maxLineLength.label: Max Line Length for Grouping

maxLinesPerGroup.description: Parser groups up to this many consecutive normal lines
maxLinesPerGroup.label: Maximum Number of Lines to Group

translationGrouping.description: Group bracketed lines as translations with main lines
translationGrouping.label: Translation Grouping
